description: Gold substage bands within a Copper stage time window (time-scoped).
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH stage_window AS (SELECT CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS s_start, CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS s_end FROM featurestore:merged_copper_stage_index_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND copper_stage_num = :stage_num ORDER BY stage_start_ts LIMIT 1), base AS (SELECT g.substage AS substage_label, CAST(g.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) AS ts FROM featurestore:merged_gold_labels_v1 g CROSS JOIN stage_window w WHERE g.name = :well_name AND g.datetime_fmt IS NOT NULL AND CAST(g.datetime_fmt AS timestamp) BETWEEN w.s_start AND w.s_end AND g.substage IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(g.substage) <> 'na'), marked AS (SELECT substage_label, ts, CASE WHEN LAG(substage_label) OVER (ORDER BY ts) IS DISTINCT FROM substage_label THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_new_group FROM base), grouped AS (SELECT substage_label, ts, SUM(is_new_group) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS group_id FROM marked) SELECT substage_label, MIN(ts) AS start_ts, MAX(ts) AS end_ts, CASE LOWER(substage_label) WHEN 'pad' THEN '#6F64C7' WHEN 'prop' THEN '#C98A2E' WHEN 'flush' THEN '#4B9F63' ELSE '#5F8FD6' END AS color, COUNT(*) AS sample_count FROM grouped GROUP BY group_id, substage_label ORDER BY MIN(ts)) q
